docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCO, JEANETTE HUERTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-17-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT JEANETTE FRANCO WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE TIME OF LAST ROLL CALL. DEFENDANT APPEARED AFTER 4PM AND INDICATED TO JUDGE CASTELLANOS SHE THOUGHT THE HEARING WAS AT 850 BRYANT STREET. HONORABLE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS GRANTED A ONE TIME CONTINUANCE ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT JEANETTE FRANCO IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
